about.description1: I'm a passionate Full Stack Developer with 3+ years of experience building web applications. I love turning complex problems into simple, beautiful, and intuitive solutions.
about.description2: When I'm not coding, you can find me exploring new technologies, contributing to open source, or enjoying the great outdoors.

project1.title: E-Commerce Platform
project1.description: A full-stack e-commerce solution built with Next.js, Node.js, and MongoDB. Features include authentication, payment integration, and admin dashboard.

project2.title: Task Management App
project2.description: A real-time collaborative task management application built with React, Socket.io, and PostgreSQL.

project3.title: AI Chat Interface
project3.description: A modern chat interface powered by OpenAI API with streaming responses, conversation history, and multi-model support.

job1.title: Senior Full Stack Developer
job1.description: Led development of microservices architecture, mentored junior developers, and improved application performance by 40%.

job2.title: Full Stack Developer

job3.title: Frontend Developer
